member.name: T:BigBoggler_Common.WPConstants
member.summary: Class to define a few constants used in this demo (for event codes, properties, etc).
member.remarks: These values are something made up for this particular demo! You can define other values (and more) in your games, as needed.

member.name: F:BigBoggler_Common.WPConstants.EvColor
member.summary: (1) Event defining a color of a player.

member.name: F:BigBoggler_Common.WPConstants.EvPosition
member.summary: (2) Event defining the position of a player.

member.name: F:BigBoggler_Common.WPConstants.GridSizeProp
member.summary: ("s") Property grid size currently used in this room.

member.name: F:BigBoggler_Common.WPConstants.MapProp
member.summary: ("m") Property map (map / level / scene) currently used in this room.

member.name: T:BigBoggler_Common.WPConstants.MapType
member.summary: Types available as map / level / scene.
